description: Square graphic in the ICE 'THE WORST FIRST' template. The background is a desaturated, high-contrast black-and-white close-up of handcuffed human hands against a dark torso. A red diagonal banner across the top-right corner reads 'CHICAGO' in white serif capitals. The top-left headline is in light cyan bold sans-serif capitals, 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL', with a white sub-line '2/17/2025 | Chicago , IL.' The name 'Thang Lam Kap' appears large in white bold sans-serif. Beneath is the white 'CRIME:' label and one bulleted charge: 'Child molestation.' The bottom left shows the DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark; the bottom right is a red box with '-THE- WORST FIRST' in white serif.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/17/2025 | Chicago, IL; Thang Lam Kap; CRIME: Child molestation; CHICAGO; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
